routes/crafting.js.findings: Cycle 3: Clean. craftLock, requireAuth, tavern rest block. Pre-validation BEFORE deduction: gold check, material check, inventory cap check, slot recipe per-item caps. Gold sync dual-field. Batch crafting with gray recipe block. Cooldown with legendary reduction. Moonlight bonus. Transmute shared cooldown. Faction rep check. Profession slot limit by player level.

routes/shop.js.findings: Wave 73: Gold source-of-truth inconsistency. shop.js /gear/buy and /shop/buy used legacy u.gold as read source, while crafting/campaigns/enchanting use u.currencies.gold. If the two fields drifted (any endpoint writes only to one), shop would see stale balance. Fixed: both endpoints now read u.currencies.gold first (calling ensureUserCurrencies), deduct from there, then sync u.gold = u.currencies.gold. /workshop/buy already used the correct pattern.

routes/gems.js.findings: Wave 41: Race condition + data integrity deep-dive. All 5 POST endpoints (socket/unsocket/upgrade/unlock-socket/polish) share a single gemLock. Lock acquired before any state mutation, released in finally. Input validation on all endpoints: parseGemKey checks, ownership checks, socketIndex bounds, gold+essenz balance checks before deduction. Unsocket: gemPreserve legendary effect correctly applies random chance. Clean.

routes/enchanting.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. enchantLock on reroll+disenchant. Gold sync. rerollLocked stat validation. 3-option reroll with preview. Locked item check on disenchant.

routes/schmiedekunst.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. schmiedeLock on all 5 POSTs. Gold sync on transmute+reforge+reforge-stats. Locked/equipped item checks on dismantle+dismantle-all+transmute. Inventory cap on transmute result. Affix reroll with moonlight bonus.

routes/social.js.findings: HIGH FIXED: 6 challenge endpoints moved to central store (state.socialData.challenges). Challenge auth+XSS+gold fixes. Trade counter-offer materials fix. 4 zombie buff types wired. Friendship required for challenges.

routes/quests.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. questCompleteLock, requireApiKey, tavern rest block, campaign sequential ordering, NPC per-player completion with claim-first guard, temp field cleanup after onQuestCompletedByUser, chain quest unlock, pool management with Fisher-Yates shuffle, input validation (title 500, desc 5000). Core quest flow verified end-to-end.

routes/gacha.js.findings: Wave 40: Deep race-condition + exploit audit. Pull locks (acquirePullLock) are per-player, cover both /pull and /pull10, released in finally blocks. No cross-endpoint leak. Inventory cap checked before pulls. 10-pull epic guarantee correctly removes replaced item from inventory (skips if duplicate). Epic pity reset on guarantee works. Mid-loop pool-empty refund is proportional to 10-pull cost (player-favorable edge case, not exploitable). Duplicate detection uses base itemId (correct). No achievements crash can block pull (try/catch). Clean.

routes/battlepass.js.findings: Wave 69: 384-line Season Pass. 2 POST endpoints (claim/:level, claim-all) both under bpClaimLock. Double-claim guard via claimedLevels.includes. Level bounds check, currentLevel reached check. All reward types handled (gold/essenz/runensplitter/stardust/sternentaler/mondstaub/material/title/frame). Code-quality finding: /claim uses inline "if (!user.currencies) user.currencies = {}" while /claim-all uses ensureUserCurrencies() helper — inconsistent but both work. No race, no double-grant.

routes/factions.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. Locks, auth, daily quest progress, standing migration, weekly bonus auto-reset, legendary+talent rep multipliers. weeklyBonusMax=3 hardcoded but consistent.

routes/expedition.js.findings: Cycle 3: MED FIXED: checkpoint rewards had xp field in data but XP was never granted — only gold/currencies processed. Added u.xp += rewards.xp. Prior fixes hold: expClaimLock, min-1-contribution guard, double-claim.

routes/challenges-weekly.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. Claim lock, double-claim guard (completedStages check), star calculation with speed bonus + legendary challengeScoreBonus, modifier system with effective progress tracking, milestone claim with cumulative star check. Week rotation deterministic.

routes/dungeons.js.findings: Wave 42: Race condition deep-dive. 3 locks: dungeonCreateLock (create), dungeonJoinLock (join), collectLock (collect rewards). All per-player with finally-block release. Join: maxPlayers check + push is synchronous in Node single-thread → no cross-player race. Double-join guarded by participants.includes(uid). Cancel: no lock but safe (creator-only check + forming-only + Node atomicity). Collect: collected.push(uid) happens BEFORE success calc to prevent partial state. Double-collect guarded by collected.includes. Clean.

routes/world-boss.js.findings: Wave 53: Race condition + edge case audit. 2 locks (wbClaimLock, wbBoostLock) per-player with finally release. Claim: double-claim guard pushes uid EARLY before reward calc (deliberate trade-off — never double-claim at cost of partial reward if error throws mid-logic, documented with comment). Unique/title/frame dedup via find() checks. Division by zero avoided via Math.max(delta, 1). Boost: double-boost guard, cost check, spendCurrency return check. /damage endpoint is admin-only (production damage flows through onQuestCompletedByUser). Clean.

routes/mail.js.findings: CRIT FIXED: item duplication exploit via duplicate itemIds. HIGH FIXED: expired mail pruning destroyed uncollected items. LOW FIXED: _mailsSent tracking after saveUsers. Added type validation on itemIds elements.

routes/kanais-cube.js.findings: Wave 56: 235-line cube system. 3 endpoints (extract/equip/unequip), 2 separate locks. Extract validates: locked item check, legendary effect presence, cost (essenz+gold escalating), library cap 50, duplicate type check. Forces MINIMUM value on extraction (D3-style anti-exploit for keeping good rolls on gear). Equip validates slot name + category/slot match. Splice destroys item permanently, no rollback if saveUsers fails (acceptable risk — saveUsers rarely fails).

routes/talent-tree.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. talentLock on allocate/deallocate/reset. canAllocate: maxRank check, available points, reqPoints, prerequisites, exclusions, choice groups with maxPicks. Respec cost gold+essenz with gold sync. getUserTalentEffects exported for cross-system use.

routes/adventure-tome.js.findings: Cycle 3: Clean. tomeClaimLock, milestone double-claim guard, gold sync, objective stat tracking against user fields. Prior race condition + gold desync fixes hold.

routes/players.js.findings: CRIT FIXED: expedition.startedAt→sentAt. HIGH FIXED: tavern status unauthed+mutating. HIGH FIXED: ultimate cooldown ordering. MED FIXED: companion swap pre-cooldown mutation. MED FIXED: name/emoji unbounded. MED FIXED: notif-read unbounded. MED FIXED: search query unbounded. LOW FIXED: cv-export unauthed. 4 zombie buffs wired (craft_discount, rift_time_extend, dungeon_reset, expedition_speed).

routes/users.js.findings: Wave 71: Security deep-dive. 2 flagged issues (not fixed in-stream, need dedicated security audit): (1) /api/auth/login has timing-oracle — user-not-found returns in ~1ms, user-wrong-password after ~100ms bcrypt delay. Attacker can enumerate valid usernames. Fix: always run bcrypt.compare (use a dummy hash for nonexistent users). (2) /api/register has async race — between await bcrypt.hash and state.users write, a concurrent request with same name can interleave. Both see empty usersByName, both create user, last write wins. Node single-thread limits interleave points to awaits but bcrypt.hash IS one. Fix: lock around register, or re-check name after bcrypt. Clean otherwise: authLimiter rate limit, timingSafeEqual for legacy apiKey path, proper token pair generation. Wave 71.1 FIXED: (1) Timing-oracle fixed — pre-compute DUMMY_PASSWORD_HASH at module load, always run bcrypt.compare in login even for nonexistent users. (2) Register race fixed — _registrationInProgress Set gates same-name concurrent registrations; also re-check usersByName AFTER bcrypt.hash as belt-and-suspenders. finally{} releases the Set slot.

routes/currency.js.findings: Cycle 3: Deep read. currencyLock on convert. dailyLock on claim. Admin-only earn. Self-check on spend/convert. Conversion: pair whitelist + 20% tax + received<=0 guard. Daily fortune random rewards. Amount 1M cap. Berlin TZ. BP XP on login.

routes/game.js.findings: HIGH FIXED: MEGA_MILESTONES (180/365 day) unreachable — nested inside !pactCompleted block, moved outside. Auth checks correct. Streak logic correct with trigger-type grace. Blood pact multipliers verified.

routes/habits-inventory.js.findings: MED FIXED: pity_minus_5 consumable used legacy global pityCounter instead of per-banner pity. Now applies +5 to all active banners. Wave 73.1: Same gold source-of-truth bug as shop.js — /player/:name/equip/:itemId when buying gear read legacy u.gold first. If currencies.gold drifted higher, user saw "Insufficient gold" despite having enough. Fixed to read u.currencies.gold first (matches shop.js fix).

All non-network errors have proper d.error fallback. loadingAction state prevents double-clicks. Overall sound.

public/data/companionExpeditions.json.findings: Cycle 2: Verified in batch audit. 4 tiers (4-24h)

public/data/dungeons.json.findings: Cycle 2: Verified in batch audit. 3 tiers

public/data/titles.json.findings: Cycle 2: Verified in batch audit. 139 titles

public/data/shopItems.json.findings: Cycle 2: Verified in batch audit. 19 items all with descriptions

routes/rift.js.findings: Cycle 3: MED FIXED: expired rift in complete-stage didn't set rift.active=false (self-healed on next GET but inconsistent). HIGH FIXED: expired rift in complete-stage didn't write fail cooldown entry — player could retry immediately after timer expiry. Bolstering affix accumulation verified correct. Mythic replay 7-day rolling window noted (design choice, not bug).

routes/config-admin.js.findings: Cycle 3: Verified new swornBondSummary/pendingBonds in socialSummary + notifications. bondChestReady + pendingBonds in notifications object. Prior findings still clean: GET-only batch, sensitive fields stripped, rested XP live-calc.

routes/npcs-misc.js.findings: Cycle 2: Verified in sweep audit. Clean. Feedback endpoint properly secured: server-set userId/timestamp, XSS escaping, 500-entry cap, admin-only GET/PATCH. NPC endpoints read-only. SPA fallback correct.

routes/docs.js.findings: Cycle 2: Verified in sweep audit. Static OpenAPI spec object. No inputs, no logic. Clean.

components/QuestBoard.tsx.findings: Cycle 2: Verified in sweep audit. Barrel re-export file only. No logic. Clean.

components/AgentCard.tsx.findings: Cycle 2: Verified in batch audit. Legacy agent card with useCountUp hook. Not player-critical. Clean.

components/DashboardModals.tsx.findings: Wave 27: Language Policy sweep + a11y. UI-shell strings translated: Waehrungen -> Currencies, Ausblenden/Waehrungen tauschen -> Hide/Currency Exchange (per user), Modifikator-Uebersicht -> Modifier Breakdown, Aktueller Streak -> Current Streak. Dropdown currency names capitalized (gold -> Gold, runensplitter -> Runensplitter etc. per user). All 5 modals got role=dialog + aria-modal=true + aria-label (Currencies / Modifier breakdown / Forge streak details / Quests overview / How XP works). Currency description flavor text kept German (content per policy).

lib/auth-client.ts.findings: HIGH fixed: authFetch token refresh retry was dead code (hadToken pattern). getAuthHeaders expiry check added earlier. getValidToken still returns without expiry check (unused externally).

routes/sworn-bonds.js.findings: Wave 50: Deep race-condition audit. All 6 mutation endpoints (propose/accept/cancel/decline/break/claim-chest) have bondLock.acquire/release with finally. Status transitions (pending->active->broken) checked before every mutation. Propose checks both players for existing bonds. Accept double-checks acceptor for concurrent bond. Node single-thread makes concurrent accept+cancel safe. FLAGGED (low-priority per user): line 470 break confirmation message is German ("Schwurbund wirklich brechen? 7 Tage Abklingzeit.") — UI shell should be English. Break endpoint uses non-standard 200+ok:false for confirmation prompt pattern but functional.

components/ContextualTutorial.tsx.findings: Wave 24: Room-name policy violations in German tutorial titles - "Der Riss" -> "The Rift", "Das Untergewoelbe" -> "The Undercroft" (explicit in room-names English list). User decisions: "Der Basar" -> "The Bazaar" (room-name consistency), "Der Season Pass" -> "Season Pass" (drop German article from English name). OK/Verstanden inconsistency (two dismiss buttons same function): both now "Verstanden" per Contextual Tutorial = German policy. Added aria-labels to all three dismiss buttons including moment title so screenreaders announce context.

components/CountUp.tsx.findings: No issues. Clean utility component (67 lines). Proper RAF cleanup.

components/ItemTooltip.tsx.findings: Wave 22: Lock indicator raw title= -> <Tip k="item_lock"> (policy fix). Socket title "Empty" -> "Empty socket" / "{gem} gem" for clarity. Set ID raw printed (e.g. "adventurer") -> formatSetLabel() with generic-tier labels + kebab-case pretty-print for named sets. Added maxHeight 80vh + overflowY:auto on tooltip body to prevent viewport overflow when item has many stats+sockets+legendary+flavor.

lib/email.js.findings: Wave 25: Doc/code env-var mismatch fixed. CLAUDE.md+.env.example documented AGENTMAIL_FROM (full email) but code read AGENTMAIL_USERNAME. resolveUsername() now accepts both (extracts username from FROM if full email, falls back to USERNAME, then default). No breaking change. User-facing tone: plain functional templates -> full Skulduggery-tone per user decision. Subject lines unchanged (spam-filter-safe). Password reset + verification emails now match in-world Hall voice.

lib/companion-config.ts.findings: Wave 28: Clean. 36-line config utility. 12 companion types all have color entries. "other" pet type falls back to DEFAULT_COMPANION_COLOR. No user-facing strings. No a11y concerns.

app/layout.tsx.findings: Wave 26: Added themeColor #0b0d11 + colorScheme dark to viewport config. Mobile browsers (chrome/safari) now paint the address bar/notification area to match body bg instead of default white. User decisions: OG tags skipped (beta not shared externally), meta description kept as "Your adventure awaits." Also stale markers cleaned up: hooks/useFirstVisit.ts and components/FirstVisitBanner.tsx did not exist in codebase, removed from tracker + CLAUDE.md reference.

public/data/gachaPool.json.findings: MED FIXED: All 6 gear items had inflated stat ranges violating T4 max (legendaries 8-20→5-8, epics 5-12→4-8, rares 4-9→4-8). Affix counts correct. Consumables OK. uniqueDrops cross-refs valid.

public/data/bannerTemplates.json.findings: Clean. 5 banners (2 active, 3 inactive). Drop rates consistent. Waffenkammer/Ruestkammer slot weights OK. Featured items reference valid gacha pool IDs.

public/data/itemTemplates.json.findings: LOW: T4 maxLevel=30 vs CLAUDE.md 25-50, but tiers array is metadata only (not consumed by game logic). Items schema clean. 8 stats, 7 slots, 8 types defined.

public/data/lootTables.json.findings: Clean. 5 rarity tiers, self-contained item data. Effects well-structured. random_gear entries present for all tiers.

public/data/suffixes.json.findings: Clean. 10 suffixes with level-scaled stat bonuses. Values reasonable (1-5 per stat at Lv50). Used for gear naming.

_meta.description: Audit markers — tracks which files have been audited, when, and how many times. Future Claude Code sessions should read this file before auditing and increment the count.
_meta.usage: Before auditing a file, check if it has a marker. After auditing, update the marker. Higher auditCount = lower priority for re-audit.
_meta.format: { filepath: { auditCount, lastAuditDate, lastAuditSession, findings, status } }
